policy: Verified positive and negative news feeds a bounded, time-decaying simulation overlay; base assumptions remain owner-controlled.

items.headline: O Presence launched for enterprise agents
items.summary: O announced “Presence,” an enterprise product for deploying governed AI agents (voice + chat) with policies, guardrails, evaluations, and escalation. It’s positioned as limited GA via enterprise-led deployments.

items.headline: O response to Hugging Face security incident
items.summary: O stated it traced a security incident during model evaluation to combinations of its models (including pre-release systems) with reduced cyber refusals for evaluation benchmarks. It describes investigative findings and next steps.

items.headline: O + Broadcom unveil Jalapeño inference chip
items.summary: O and Broadcom unveiled “Jalapeño,” framed as the first O Intelligence Processor. O claims early testing shows substantially better performance-per-watt than state-of-the-art and targets gigawatt-scale deployment with partners.

items.headline: O to acquire Ona
items.summary: O announced an acquisition of Ona to add secure cloud execution/orchestration into O’s Codex ecosystem. Deal is subject to regulatory approvals; closing timing not specified in the release.
